column2: Test Press Media Handling and Landowner Notification
column3: ['Log in as a user planning an operation in a community area. ', 'Initiate press/media handling or prior-notification to landowners as required by cap 1616 and GDPR. ', 'Verify that the system handles press/media requests appropriately. ', 'Confirm landowner notification. ']
column4: ['Successfully log in as the user and verify that they are planning an operation in a community area. ', 'The system correctly initiates press/media handling or prior-notification to the specified landowners according to cap 1616 and GDPR. ', "Press/media requests are handled in a manner consistent with best practices, regulations, and the system's design. ", 'Landowners receive proper notifications regarding the operation as required by cap 1616 and GDPR. ']
